description_long: This is a single, whole lemon with a bright yellow, textured peel and an oval, slightly tapered shape. The surface is dimpled and matte, typical of a fresh citrus fruit, and one end features a small, slightly protruding nub where the stem was attached. A white retail sticker with a barcode and the word 'lemon' is affixed to one side, indicating it is store-bought. The peel appears mostly intact with minor natural imperfections and a small mark near one end. The lemon's size and proportions are consistent with those commonly found in grocery stores. No other objects or urban context are visible in the images.
description: A bright yellow, oval lemon with a dimpled peel and a retail sticker on one side. The surface is mostly intact with minor marks and a small stem nub.
description_view_0: The lemon is shown from the side with a white retail sticker and barcode clearly visible on the peel.
description_view_1: This view highlights the stem end of the lemon, showing a small nub and a slight mark near the tip.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the lemon is visible, showing the uninterrupted yellow peel without any stickers or major blemishes.
description_view_3: The lemon is viewed from the blossom end, displaying the rounded tip and the overall oval shape.
attribute_peel_condition: The peel is dimpled, matte, mostly intact, with minor natural marks and a small blemish near one end.
